files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.Arena
files.Summary: Defines a contiguous block of pre-allocated unmanaged memory that Clay uses for all structural and dynamic layout allocations.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.AspectRatioElementConfig
files.Summary: Imposes aspect ratio constraints on a UI element.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.AspectRatioElementConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.BorderElementConfig
files.Summary: Configures styling properties for drawing borders around layout nodes.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.BorderElementConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.BorderRenderData
files.Summary: Describes calculated border coordinates and stroke styling emitted inside border render commands.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.BorderWidth
files.Summary: Specifies border stroke widths for each edge of a container.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.BoundingBox
files.Summary: Defines a 2D bounding rectangle representing computed UI element placements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ChildAlignment
files.Summary: Specifies how child elements are aligned within their parent container along both axes.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ClayNative.Clay_MeasureTextCallback
files.Summary: Defines the signature of the text measurement callback used by Clay to compute text dimensions.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ClayNative.OnHoverCallback
files.Summary: Defines the signature of the callback invoked when a pointer hovers over an element configured with an hover handler.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ClayNative
files.Summary: Provides low-level, high-performance C# bindings to the native Clay layout library. Uses source-generated marshalling via and compiles with runtime marshalling disabled for zero-overhead, direct native transitions.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ClayString
files.Summary: A native string wrapper used by Clay to represent text safely across the ABI.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ClayStringSlice
files.Summary: Represents a slice or segment of a string. Used by Clay's text layout engine during wrapping and text rendering.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ClipElementConfig
files.Summary: Configures boundary clipping properties for layout nodes.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ClipElementConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ClipRenderData
files.Summary: Describes clipping parameters emitted inside scissor/clip render commands.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.Color
files.Summary: Represents a color using four floating-point components (Red, Green, Blue, Alpha).

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.Context
files.Summary: Opaque wrapper representing Clay's internal layout engine context context. This state should only be accessed via pointers returned by or .

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.CornerRadius
files.Summary: Specifies corner rounding radii for rectangles, borders, and images.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.CustomElementConfig
files.Summary: Custom element layout configuration block.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.CustomElementConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.CustomRenderData
files.Summary: Describes a custom element payload emitted inside custom render commands.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.DebugElementData
files.Summary: Structural debugging attributes associated with layout elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.Dimensions
files.Summary: Represents standard 2D floating-point dimensions.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ElementConfig
files.Summary: Associates a layout configuration style with its category type identifier.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ElementConfigArraySlice
files.Summary: Represents a slice segment pointing into a native unmanaged array of entries.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ElementConfigType
files.Summary: Specifies the type of layout configuration applied to a UI element. This configuration determines which rendering, sizing, or layout rules Clay applies to the element.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ElementConfigUnion
files.Summary: Emulates an anonymous configuration C union inside , holding style detail pointers. Only one field should be accessed corresponding to the .

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ElementData
files.Summary: Public structure containing calculated layout coordinates.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ElementDeclaration
files.Summary: Composite declaration structure encapsulating all layout, style, and rendering configs for a single UI element. Pass this to to apply styling.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ElementId
files.Summary: Holds unique identifiers generated by Clay to track element lifecycle, focus, and layout state.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ElementIdArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ErrorData
files.Summary: Structure containing detailed diagnostic information returned when layout errors occur.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ErrorHandler
files.Summary: Holds callback function pointer registrations for native error handling.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ErrorType
files.Summary: Defines the specific errors that can occur during layout calculation or configuration in Clay.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.FloatingAttachPointType
files.Summary: Defines the attachment points on an element and its target when using floating (absolute) positioning.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.FloatingAttachPoints
files.Summary: Defines target attachment points for floating elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.FloatingAttachToElement
files.Summary: Identifies which element a floating container attaches to.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.FloatingClipToElement
files.Summary: Controls whether a floating element should be clipped by another element's bounds.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.FloatingElementConfig
files.Summary: Controls positioning, depth, and attachment behavior of floating (absolute positioned) UI elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.FloatingElementConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ImageElementConfig
files.Summary: Holds image element render configurations.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ImageElementConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ImageRenderData
files.Summary: Describes image content emitted inside image render commands.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutAlignmentX
files.Summary: Controls horizontal alignment of children within a layout container.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutAlignmentY
files.Summary: Controls vertical alignment of children within a layout container.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutConfig
files.Summary: Defines general layout configurations for element arrangement, spacing, and sizing.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutDirection
files.Summary: Defines the layout direction along which children are arranged.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutElement
files.Summary: Represents a core layout node within Clay's internal structural layout tree.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutElementChildren
files.Summary: Emulates an anonymous C-style union containing either list of child element indices or text element details. Field offsets overlap so only one field should be accessed corresponding to layout node type.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutElementChildrenData
files.Summary: Holds list of child elements inside a container.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutElementHashMapItem
files.Summary: Represents an entry in Clay's internal layout spatial hash map, used for fast lookup, hover, and layout calculation.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutElementTreeNode
files.Summary: A layout tree node structure tracking hierarchical rendering positioning.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.LayoutElementTreeRoot
files.Summary: Defines the entry root configurations for a layout tree rendering hierarchy.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.MeasureTextCacheItem
files.Summary: Represents an item stored inside Clay's internal text measurement cache.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.MeasuredWord
files.Summary: Holds sizing metadata for a single word computed during text layout wrapping.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.Padding
files.Summary: Defines inner spacing padding values surrounding the children of a container.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.PointerCaptureMode
files.Summary: Controls pointer capture behavior for floating elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.PointerData
files.Summary: Contains pointer (e.g. mouse or touch) position and state information.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.PointerDataInteractionState
files.Summary: Represents the interaction state of a pointer (e.g. mouse or touch) on a UI element.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.RectangleRenderData
files.Summary: Describes a filled background rectangle emitted inside rectangle render commands.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.RenderCommand
files.Summary: Encapsulates a single drawing instruction emitted by Clay's layout resolver.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.RenderCommandArray
files.Summary: Contiguous unmanaged array containing the list of elements computed for the current frame.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.RenderCommandType
files.Summary: Specifies the rendering operation command type emitted in the output render command array.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.RenderData
files.Summary: Emulates an anonymous C union packing specific layout drawing payloads. Only one field should be accessed corresponding to the .

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ScrollContainerData
files.Summary: Public structure containing scroll coordinates and dimensions for scrollable elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.ScrollContainerDataInternal
files.Summary: Internal layout engine scroll tracker holding physics and position metadata for a scroll container.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.SharedElementConfig
files.Summary: Represents style settings that are shared across multiple layout nodes.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.SharedElementConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.Sizing
files.Summary: Defines layout sizing rules for both axes of a UI element.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.SizingAxis
files.Summary: Specifies sizing rules and constraints for a single layout axis (either Width or Height).

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.SizingAxisValue
files.Summary: Emulates an anonymous C union representing a sizing constraint value. Field offsets overlap so that it can store either percentage values or min/max bounds.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.SizingMinMax
files.Summary: Defines the minimum and maximum constraints for element dimensions.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.SizingType
files.Summary: Determines how an element is sized along a layout axis.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.StringArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.TextAlignment
files.Summary: Specifies the horizontal alignment of text within its bounding container.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.TextElementConfig
files.Summary: Provides configuration settings for rendering text elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.TextElementConfigArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.TextElementConfigWrapMode
files.Summary: Defines how text within a text element wraps.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.TextElementData
files.Summary: Holds layout and wrapping details computed specifically for text elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.TextRenderData
files.Summary: Describes text content and style attributes emitted inside text render commands.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.Vector2
files.Summary: Represents a standard 2D vector.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.Warning
files.Summary: Structure packing diagnostic warning messaging.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.WrappedTextLine
files.Summary: Describes a single computed line of text resulting from word wrapping operations.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.WrappedTextLineArraySlice
files.Summary: Represents a slice segment pointing into an unmanaged array of wrapped text lines.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.boolArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for boolean elements.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.charArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for raw character bytes.

files.Title: ClaySharp.Interop.int32_tArray
files.Summary: Unmanaged array wrapper for 32-bit signed integers.
